mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_annual_report ( code, name, report_year, report_date, total_revenue, net_profit, parent_net_profit, gross_margin, net_margin, roe, operating_cash_flow, debt_ratio, current_ratio, inventory_days, receivable_days, revenue_yoy, profit_yoy, source ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{name}, #{reportYear}, #{reportDate}, #{totalRevenue}, #{netProfit}, #{parentNetProfit}, #{grossMargin}, #{netMargin}, #{roe}, #{operatingCashFlow}, #{debtRatio}, #{currentRatio}, #{inventoryDays}, #{receivableDays}, #{revenueYoy}, #{profitYoy}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), report_date = VALUES(report_date), total_revenue = VALUES(total_revenue), net_profit = VALUES(net_profit), parent_net_profit = VALUES(parent_net_profit), gross_margin = VALUES(gross_margin), net_margin = VALUES(net_margin), roe = VALUES(roe), operating_cash_flow = VALUES(operating_cash_flow), debt_ratio = VALUES(debt_ratio), current_ratio = VALUES(current_ratio), inventory_days = VALUES(inventory_days), receivable_days = VALUES(receivable_days), revenue_yoy = VALUES(revenue_yoy), profit_yoy = VALUES(profit_yoy), source = VALUES(source), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock_annual_report WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY report_year DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM stock_annual_report WHERE code = #{code} AND report_year = #{reportYear} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM stock_annual_report WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.delete: DELETE t1 FROM stock_annual_report t1 INNER JOIN stock_annual_report t2 ON t1.code = t2.code AND t1.report_year = t2.report_year AND t1.id < t2.id
